caption: A person's hands are shown opening a cardboard box on a white surface. The setting is a room with a branded background featuring the logo "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" as well as the text "SEBREAKS". In the background, another box sits near a red and white cup. A small inset window in the corner of the frames shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap. The main focus is on the hands, which move across the top of a white box. As the sequence progresses, the hands use a tool to slice through the packaging tape of the box. The text "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" is printed on the side of the cardboard. The scene transitions from the hands resting on the box to the active process of cutting the seal to open the contents.
